  FINAL VERDICT
========================================

  â  NO VIOLATIONS FOUND for J up to 10000
  â  The current Jmax = 60 appears SUFFICIENT.
  â  The SDPB bound is consistent with large-J positivity.

  Note: This does not prove positivity for ALL J > 60 at ALL x,
  but the smart grid provides strong evidence. The asymptotic
  analysis above shows the convergence pattern toward Jââ.
